c=string.byte return c end end)()do local s=(function()do local c=table.concat return c end end)()do local Y=(function()do local c=string.char return c end end)()local function d(c)return(c>=48 and c<=57)or(c>=65 and c<=90)or(c>=97 and c<=122)end function e(V,i)do local t=(function()do local c={}return c end end)()for s=1,#V,1 do do local q=(function()do local c=C(V,s)return c end end)()if not d(q)then c(t,Y(q))else do local C if q>=48 and q<=57 then C=(((((q-48)-i%10)+10))%10)+48 elseif q>=65 and q<=90 then C=(((((q-65)-i%26)+26))%26)+65 elseif q>=97 and q<=122 then
